title: PAU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Field Helper Posts
description: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Junior Field Helper Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can take this opportunity and apply for the PAU Recruitment 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
